description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, multi-tiered roof and a combination of black and white exterior walls. The front facade features large rectangular windows, a central entry door, and a garage on the left side. The rear of the house opens to a spacious tiled patio area with a swimming pool and a covered outdoor lounge. The house includes multiple balconies and overhangs, providing shaded outdoor spaces. The window arrangement is mostly horizontal and asymmetrical, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The materials appear to be concrete, glass, wood, and metal, with a focus on clean lines and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, featuring black and white walls and multiple balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, and a prominent balcony above the entryway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, covered outdoor lounge, and the swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, swimming pool, and large glass doors leading inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view focusing on the pool, tiled patio, and a secondary outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent garage; minimalistic and functional design.
